global.label: Emergency services
global.contact: Call your local emergency number now
global.description: Use the official emergency number in your location if there is immediate danger or risk of self-harm.

global.label: Trusted person nearby
global.contact: Call or go to someone you trust right now
global.description: Stay with another person while the immediate crisis is active.

global.label: Local crisis line
global.contact: Use the official crisis or suicide prevention line available where you live
global.description: If you are outside the listed regions, use the local crisis service published by your health authority.

us.label: Emergency services
us.description: Use 911 if there is immediate danger or you might act on self-harm right now.

us.label: 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline
us.description: The official US 988 Lifeline offers free crisis support by phone or text, 24/7.

us.label: Someone with you now
us.contact: Ask a trusted person to stay with you
us.description: Do not stay alone while the immediate crisis is active.

es.label: Emergencias
es.description: Usa el 112 si hay peligro inmediato o riesgo de hacerte dano ahora mismo.

es.label: Linea 024
es.description: La linea 024 del Ministerio de Sanidad ofrece ayuda para conducta suicida las 24 horas.

es.label: Persona de confianza
es.contact: Llama o ve con alguien cercano ahora mismo
es.description: No te quedes solo mientras el riesgo inmediato siga activo.

br.label: Emergencia
br.contact: 192 ou o numero de emergencia local
br.description: Use o servico de emergencia local se houver perigo imediato ou risco de se machucar agora.

br.label: CVV
br.description: O CVV oferece apoio emocional e prevencao do suicidio por telefone, gratuitamente, 24 horas por dia.

br.label: Pessoa de confianca
br.contact: Ligue ou va para perto de alguem agora
br.description: Nao fique sozinho enquanto a crise imediata estiver ativa.
